_comment: TacticalManager world/turn surface for the Tactical.Mission group. Trivial passthroughs on the live manager singleton; the count queries that take Il2CppSystem.Nullable<> arguments are hand-written in Tactical/Mission.cs so modders see clean nullable C# params.

verbs.name: IsPlayerTurn
verbs.summary: Whether it is currently the player faction's turn.

verbs.name: IsFinished
verbs.summary: Whether the mission has reached a finished state.

verbs.name: IsAnyPlayerUnitAlive
verbs.summary: Whether any player unit is still alive.

verbs.name: IsAnyAIUnitAlive
verbs.summary: Whether any AI unit is still alive.

verbs.name: NextRound
verbs.summary: Advance the mission to the next round.

verbs.name: NextFaction
verbs.summary: Hand the turn to the next faction.

verbs.name: Finish
verbs.summary: End the mission with the given finish reason.

verbs.name: SetActiveActor
verbs.summary: Make the given actor the active actor, ending the previous actor's turn.
